text.title: Gumroad Ops Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping product type, MoR acceptance, cover quality, and affiliate intent to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the product a digital good (file / license / link) suitable for Gumroad MoR?

branch.when: product_type NOT IN ('file','license','link') OR mor_unacceptable == true

conclusion.verdict: SKIP — use Stripe-direct or invoicing channel
BLOCK — fill six mandatory fields before publish
BLOCK — disable parallel VAT invoice; MoR handles it
BLOCK — cover too small; re-export at ≥1600×900

text.example: File product, cover 1600×900, six listing fields filled, uses_mor=true with no double-VAT, affiliate at 40%, all gates green → APPROVE.
